benefits.description: Lost 5 pounds after reducing dose from 10 mg to 5 mg, breaking out of weight loss stall

side_effects.description: Higher dose (10 mg) caused stress which led to increased snacking and candy consumption, reduced appetite suppression effect
Increased heart rate correlated with higher dose

protocol_notes: User was on 10 mg Tirzepatide for 2 months with weight loss stall of 2-3 pounds. Reduced dose to 5 mg (previously tolerated well) and resumed consistent weight loss. User notes that higher dose appears to induce stress response leading to increased appetite despite medication, contrary to expected dose-response relationship. No appetite suppression observed at 10 mg dose.
